overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical coastal settlement. The character walks through shallow water near a waterfall, crosses rocky streams, and navigates wooden dock platforms and stairs within a vibrant post-apocalyptic village.

agents.ego_description: walking along sandy beach toward a shallow stream at the settlement edge

entered.detail: large green canvas tent with wooden support poles and red trim
elevated wooden dock structure with rope railings extending over water
rustic wooden hut with thatched roof and carved decorations
tall palm tree visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny tropical beach at the edge of a settlement. The character walks forward on sandy ground toward a shallow stream, with green canvas tents and wooden dock structures visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow rocky stream with wooden posts

events.description: character steps from sand into shallow rocky stream

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water with visible rocky bed

notable_agents.action: NPC standing in the water facing the character

entered.detail: shallow clear water with visible rocks and pebbles on the bottom
small waterfall with mist rising at its base
vertical wooden posts standing in the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow rocky stream, wading through clear water toward a waterfall in the distance. A lone NPC stands in the water ahead, and wooden posts emerge from the stream bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall pool area with stone ruins

events.description: character turns around in the water near the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall then turning around to head back downstream

entered.detail: ancient stone wall covered in green vines and moss

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfall area surrounded by vine-covered stone ruins. After approaching the misty base of the falls, the character turns around in the water to head back toward the settlement.

events.description: character exits water onto wooden dock platform

agents.ego_description: wading back through the stream and stepping onto a wooden dock

entered.detail: clusters of vibrant purple flowers along the stream bank

segments.scene_description: The character walks back through the shallow water toward the settlement, passing purple flowers along the bank. The character steps out of the water onto a wooden dock platform, moving away from the waterfall area.

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock platforms passing NPCs and tents

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near tent entrance looking toward the water
NPC walking along the dock in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden rope bridge connecting elevated structures
tall wooden watchtower with platform and hanging lantern

segments.scene_description: The character walks along elevated wooden dock platforms through the settlement, passing NPCs and green canvas tents. A rope bridge and tall watchtower become visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: character walks under covered canvas canopy

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs through covered walkway, passing multiple NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC walking down the stairs toward the character
NPC standing near workbench with tools

entered.detail: green and beige canvas stretched overhead providing shelter
weathered wooden stairs with red painted edges
wooden workbench with baskets and crafting materials

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a covered canvas canopy and begins ascending wooden stairs through the settlement. The area is sheltered overhead, with NPCs walking in the opposite direction and a workbench visible along the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny tropical beach, through a rocky stream and waterfall, and back into the heart of a coastal settlement. It begins on sandy ground moving toward a shallow stream, where the character wades through clear water past wooden posts and a lone NPC toward a distant waterfall. As the camera reaches the misty base of the falls surrounded by vine-covered stone ruins, the character turns around to retrace their steps, passing purple flowers along the bank before stepping onto a wooden dock platform. The scene then expands across elevated walkways and green canvas tents, moving past villagers toward a distant rope bridge and watchtower. Finally, the camera glides under a covered canvas canopy and ascends a set of wooden stairs, passing a workbench and other inhabitants within the sheltered interior of the village.
